rationale: In the citing paper, Yang, Toubia, and De Jong (2015) is cited only in grouped background lists: as an example of prior incentive-aligned CBC studies, prior eye-tracking use in preference measurement, and prior survey design choices (e.g., external validity task placement). The text does not assign this specific paper a distinct role in hypothesis development, model specification, estimation strategy, or interpretation of findings. Its function is bibliographic/contextual rather than a direct conceptual or methodological pillar for the 2018 paper.
